about.title: About Cahaya Interior Sejahtera
about.hero_heading: Designing Spaces That Balance Function, Comfort & Identity
about.hero_description: Cahaya Interior Sejahtera is a premier interior design and construction firm. We craft bespoke spaces that merge functional excellence with timeless aesthetics.
about.hero_heading: Designing Spaces That Balance Function, Comfort & Identity
about.hero_description: Cahaya Interior Sejahtera is a premier interior design and construction firm. We craft bespoke spaces that merge functional excellence with refined, timeless aesthetics tailored to your identity.
about.description: Cahaya Interior Sejahtera is a company specializing in interior design and execution for residences, offices, commercial spaces, and various interior needs. We are committed to delivering interior solutions that combine aesthetics, functionality, and the highest quality workmanship for every project.
about.commitment: We believe that every space has unique character and needs. Therefore, each project is executed with a detailed approach, from planning, material selection, to the execution process. Our focus is creating comfortable, functional spaces with high aesthetic value according to client needs.
about.vision: To become a trusted interior company delivering quality design and execution solutions in Indonesia.
about.mission_2: Providing professional service to every client.
home.hero_title: Bring Your Dream Interior to Life with Cahaya Interior Sejahtera
home.hero_subtitle: Cahaya Interior Sejahtera delivers quality interior design and construction services for homes, offices, and commercial spaces. We prioritize aesthetics, function, and craftsmanship to create spaces that are comfortable and refined.
home.intro_title: More Than Just Design — We Create Spaces That Tell a Story.
home.intro_p1: Cahaya Interior Sejahtera is a trusted partner for professional interior design and construction services. We serve private residences, corporate offices, commercial spaces, and custom furniture projects tailored to your needs.
home.intro_p2: With a structured approach and an experienced team, every project is handled from planning, material selection, through to final finishing — ensuring results that are aesthetic, functional, and on time.
home.pillars_subtitle: Our commitment is to deliver interior solutions that are high-quality, functional, and tailored to each client's needs.
home.pillar_1_desc: Every project is executed to high quality standards with full attention to detail, from material selection through to finishing.
home.pillar_2_desc: We create designs that are not only visually beautiful, but also comfortable and effective to use every day.
home.pillar_3_desc: Clear communication, a structured process, and on-time delivery are our priorities on every project.
home.selected_works_subtitle: A selection of interior projects we have completed for residences, offices, and various commercial spaces.
home.services_subtitle: We provide complete interior solutions, from design through to construction, for all your space needs.
home.service_1_desc: Bring your dream home to life with elegant and functional home interior design. We handle every room, from living room to bedroom.
home.service_2_desc: Boost your company's productivity and image with a modern, professional, and comfortable office interior design.
home.service_3_desc: Our custom furniture is specially designed to your exact dimensions and taste, using selected quality materials.
home.service_4_desc: Functional and aesthetic custom kitchen sets, designed to maximize your kitchen space with a premium touch.
home.service_5_desc: Creative room partition and ceiling solutions that beautify the interior while optimizing overall space planning.
home.service_6_desc: Comprehensive interior renovation services to refresh and modernize the look and function of your existing space.
home.cta_title: Bring Your Dream Interior to Life
home.cta_subtitle: Consult your home, office, or commercial space interior needs with the Cahaya Interior Sejahtera team. Free initial consultation.
projects.title: Selected Works & Architectural Explorations
projects.subtitle: Discover our portfolio of premium interior spaces and structural achievements. Each project represents a synthesis of rigorous design methodology and masterful execution.
projects.detail_cta_subtitle: Schedule a private consultation with our principal designers to discuss your vision.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you are envisioning a complete architectural redesign or seeking subtle refinements for your space, our team is ready to collaborate. Reach out to discuss your next premium interior project.
contact.subject: Project Type / Subject
contact.whatsapp_desc: Prefer an immediate response? Chat with our lead design consultant directly via WhatsApp for a preliminary discussion.
